title: Stone Brick XP Bar
description: Gives a custom stone brick/mossy stone brick texture to the experience bar.
body: # Description Gives the XP Bar a custom stone brick-themed texture. Regular stone bricks are used to show the empty region of the bar, while mossy stone bricks are used to show the filled region. Avoid looking too closely, because it may make it harder to tell them apart. # Versions Supports Java 1.20.2 - 26.1.2 # Compatibility Incompatible with XP Bar packs and some GUI packs. # Want more XP Bar packs? ![Animated XP Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a086bb57eda1d0a5d98e5ac3d54249187aaf7d34.gif) ![Lava XP Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7274d284c329dbe9542f650566558a56273cb15f.gif) ![Stone Brick XP Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1166a7d73761f469c0d532521679079c9343601f.png) ![Sculk XP Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bb4c39944af28ed79efa18881f60bcf3b9000f2.gif)
